ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset file */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., URL, database, file path) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., CSV, Excel, SQL) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is publicly accessible */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parametersets" (
  "parameterset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the parameter set belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter set */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the parameter set */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter set is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the parameter set */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the parameter set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameterset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parametersets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypotheses" (
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hypothesis */,
  "parameterset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter set the hypothesis belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hypothesis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hypothesis */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the hypothesis */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hypothesis is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the hypothesis */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the hypothesis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hypothesis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hypotheses_parameterset_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameterset_id") REFERENCES parametersets ("parameterset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "hypothesis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hypothesis the parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the parameter */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_hypothesis_id FOREIGN KEY ("hypothesis_id") REFERENCES hypotheses ("hypothesis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the model */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "model_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the model was run on */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the model was run */,
  "run_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model run (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  "run_duration" REAL /* Duration of the model run */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model run results are publicly accessible */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the model run */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the model run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_run_by FOREIGN KEY ("run_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the result belongs to */,
  "SSE" REAL /* Sum of Squared Errors (SSE) */,
  "AIC" REAL /* Akaike Information Criterion (AIC) */,
  "AICc" REAL /* Corrected Akaike Information Criterion (AICc) */,
  "BIC" REAL /* Bayesian Information Criterion (BIC) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the results are publicly accessible */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the result */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the result */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format in which the results were exported (e.g., CSV, Excel, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_model_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("model_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., dataset upload, model run) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the audit entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is publicly accessible */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the comment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_model_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("model_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "model_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the collaborator is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., researcher, reviewer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the collaboration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the collaboration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the collaboration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_model_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("model_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
